hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.ebnf) printf "%s\n" "PGEN EBNF GUARDRAIL — before changing any return annotation in a .ebnf grammar, RE-READ: the target *.ebnf grammar itself, grammars/return_annotation.ebnf (\$N | \$N::M[*] | single-star \$N* | flat-spread \$N**), docs/RETURN_ANNOTATIONS_REFERENCE.md, docs/reference/PGEN_ANNOTATION_NORMATIVE_SPEC.md, and memory feedback_quantified_group_extraction + feedback_ebnf_consult_annotation_docs. Copy the proven systemverilog.ebnf idiom; after regen ALWAYS verify with parseability_probe --parse-dump-ast-pretty before trusting the shape." >&2 ;; esac; exit 0

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": "POST-COMPACTION RESUME PROTOCOL — context was just summarized. Re-read: (1) README.md, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP.md, COMMIT.md; (2) live-docs — LIVE_ACHIEVEMENT_STATUS.md, CHANGES.md, DEVELOPMENT_NOTES.md, and the auto-memory MEMORY.md index (authoritative durable feedback — honor it); (3) live-books (MDBOOKs) — docs/book/ (top-level) and the per-parser book for the in-flight lane; (4) docs/TASK_TREE.md Active Task Trees + the owning docs/tasks/<TREE>.md for the current frontier. git log + working tree are the true state (committed per-leaf). Resume the in-flight lane where it stopped — do not restart it."}}'
